caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storms Bring Heavy Rain
caribbean.paragraph: Grenada is experiencing 94% rain probability with winds of 13 kt and wave heights of 4.6 ft, while Aruba is seeing winds of 22 kt. I expect the heavy rain in Grenada to be the most impactful weather story in the region today, with minimal wind and wave concerns at this time.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Weather Update
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing a 10% rain probability with max winds of 14 kt and wave heights of 3.7 ft, while Palma de Mallorca has a similar forecast with max winds of 13 kt. I expect these conditions to prevail throughout the day, with the dominant swell direction coming from the WNW and a swell period of 12 s, making for a relatively calm day in the Western Mediterranean ports.
